title: mentha × stachyoides var. wohlwerthiana
intro: Mentha × stachyoides var. wohlwerthiana, also known as Wohlwerth's mint, is a rare and hybrid variety of the mint plant, resulting from the cross between Mentha stachyoides and Mentha aquatica. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oils, which contain compounds like menthone, menthol, and limonene, offering anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Wohlwerth's mint include relief from digestive issues, headaches, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to reduce stress and promote a good night's sleep. Wohlwerth's mint is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and essential oil infusions, which can be used topically or ingested to reap its medicinal benefits.
